UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMStandardDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMStandardDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' xmlns:typens='http://www.esri.com/schemas/ArcGIS/3.4.0'><WorkspaceConnectionString>DATABASE=W:\100122184 FFX LHC Detailed Model\03-Project Data\Structures\Survey\2025-09-19 Hunting Crk Watershed Deliverable\Bridge & Culvert Surveys\GIS Shapefiles</WorkspaceConnectionString><WorkspaceFactory>Shapefile</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>All_Survey_Points</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMStandardDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><AddField><field_name>Type</field_name><field_type>TEXT</field_type><field_length>255</field_length><field_is_nullable>False</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow></operationSequence>
CalculateField "Survey Data\All_Survey_Points" Type "Chanenl" PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
